            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "export function ModelSheet({ open, onOpenChange, template, units }: ModelSheetProps) {"
          },
          {

            "text": "  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();"

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "  const slugify = (text: string) =\u003e {"

            "text": "    return text"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "export const SaveExamItemSchema = z.object({"

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "export type SaveExamItemInput = z.infer\u003ctypeof SaveExamItemSchema\u003e;"
          },
          {

          },

            "text": "export const ProfileSchema = z.object"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "// ────── REPORT MIRROR (SNAPSHOT) ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": " * Generates the full HTML body for the report from a snapshot."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": " * Falls back to template values if snapshot sections are missing or empty."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "function generateReportHTML(snapshot: ExamFormSnapshot, template?: { technique?: string | null, description?: string | null, impression?: string | null }) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "  const sections: string[] = [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "  const technique = snapshot.technique || template?.technique;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "  const description = snapshot.description || template?.description;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "  const impression = snapshot.impression || template?.impression;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "  if (technique) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "    sections.push(&#96;\u003csection\u003e\u003ch3\u003eTécnica\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cdiv\u003e${technique}\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/section\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "  if (description) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "    sections.push(&#96;\u003csection\u003e\u003ch3\u003eResultado\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cdiv\u003e${description}\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/section\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "  if (impression) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "    sections.push(&#96;\u003csection\u003e\u003ch3\u003eImpressão\u003c/h3\u003e\u003cdiv\u003e${impression}\u003c/div\u003e\u003c/section\u003e&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "  return sections.join(\"\\n\\n\");"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": " * Creates/Updates a standalone snapshot of the report in the exam_reports table."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": " * This mirror is used for future consultations independent of template changes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "interface PageProps {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "export default async function EditorPage({ params }: PageProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  const { requestId, itemId } = await params;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const supabase = await createClient();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    data: { user },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  if (!user) redirect(\"/auth/login\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  // Fetch exam item with template and request context"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    .select("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      id, status, form_snapshot, updated_at,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      exam_templates ( id, title, technique, description, impression, variables ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      exam_requests!inner ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        id, status, date, notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        patients ( id, name, birth_date, cpf, gender ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        units ( id, name, report_header, report_footer )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    .eq(\"request_id\", requestId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  if (!item) notFound();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  // Fetch phrases for the sidebar"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  // Helper to replace variable placeholders with actual selected values"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  const renderContent = (content: string | null | undefined) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    if (!content) return \"\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    // 1. Replace Tiptap spans: \u003cspan data-variable=\"name\"\u003e...\u003c/span\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    let processed = content.replace(/\u003cspan[^\u003e]*data-variable=\"([^\"]+)\"[^\u003e]*\u003e([\\s\\S]*?)\u003c\\/span\u003e/g, (match, varName) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      return selections[varName] || variables.find((v: any) =\u003e v.name === varName)?.label || &#96;[${varName}]&#96;;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    // 2. Replace raw braces: {{variable_name}}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    processed = processed.replace(/\\{\\{([^}]+)\\}\\}/g, (match, varName) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      const name = varName.trim();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      return selections[name] || variables.find((v: any) =\u003e v.name === name)?.label || match;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    // 3. Image Style Consolidation"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    // Identifies \u003cimg\u003e tags and merges layout properties into a single style attribute."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    processed = processed.replace(/\u003cimg([^\u003e]*)\u003e/g, (match: string, attrGroup: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "      // Extract existing attributes"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "      const attrs: Record\u003cstring, string\u003e = {};"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": ";"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "export default async function PrintLaudoPage({"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  params,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "}: {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  params: Promise\u003c{ requestId: string; itemId: string }\u003e;"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "}) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  const { requestId, itemId } = await params;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  const supabase = await createClient();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  if (!user) redirect(\"/auth/login\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  // Fetch the exam item and related data"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    .select(&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      id, form_snapshot, status, completed_at,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      exam_templates ( id, title, technique, description, impression, variables ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      exam_requests ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        id, date, status, notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        patients ( id, name, cpf, birth_date, gender ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        units ( id, name, report_header, report_footer, logo_url )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    &#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    .eq(\"request_id\", requestId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  if (!item || !item.exam_requests) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    notFound();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  // Cast intermediate types as Supabase JS inner joins return arrays conceptually (though single due to FK)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  const request = (item.exam_requests as unknown) as ExamRequest \u0026 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    patients: Patient | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    units: Unit | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  const template = (item.exam_templates as unknown) as (ExamTemplate \u0026 { variables: any[] }) | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  const patient = request.patients;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  const unit = request.units;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  if (!patient || !unit) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    notFound();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  const { data: profile } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    .from(\"profiles\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    .select(\"full_name, crm, signature\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  const snapshot = item.form_snapshot as any;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  const selections = snapshot?.variable_selections || {};"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  const variables = template?.variables || [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  // Helper to replace variable placeholders with actual selected values"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 261
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 10
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\app\\(print)\\laudos\\[requestId]\\[itemId]\\imprimir\\page.tsx",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.28315985202789307

            "text": "export function PhraseSheet({ open, onOpenChange, phrase }: PhraseSheetProps) {"

          },

            "text": "  return ("

            "text": "          \u003cSheetDescription\u003e"
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "          \u003c/SheetDescription\u003e"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "            \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"label\"\u003eRótulo / Nome Curto *\u003c/Label\u003e"
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "export async function saveExamItem("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  itemId: string,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "  snapshot: Partial\u003cExamFormSnapshot\u003e"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": ") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  const parsed = SaveExamItemSchema.safeParse(snapshot);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) return { error: \"Dados inválidos\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "  const formSnapshot: ExamFormSnapshot = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    technique: parsed.data.technique ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    description: parsed.data.description ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    impression: parsed.data.impression ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    variable_selections: parsed.data.variable_selections,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "  const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    .update({ form_snapshot: formSnapshot as unknown as Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e, status: \"in_progress\" })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  if (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    console.error(\"Error saving exam item:\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  }"

          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "  // Fetch the requestId to revalidate correctly"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    .select(\"request_id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "  if (item) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "    revalidatePath(&#96;/laudos/${item.request_id}/${itemId}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/laudos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "  // Mirror the report snapshot to exam_reports table"
          },

            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "  try {"

            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    await upsertExamReport(itemId, formSnapshot);"

          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "  } catch (err) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    console.error(\"Error mirroring report:\", err);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "  return { success: true };"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {

          },
          {

I'm converting the window into tabs with technique, description, and printing fields. 

**Choosing editor component**

I'm leaning toward using LaudoEditor as the primary component since it's the main laudo editing experience, not ModelSheet which is for templates.

I'm replacing custom tab buttons with the Tabs component from @/components/ui/tabs for LaudoEditor. I'm adding TabsContent components for each section and syncing the active tab with the editor state. I'm restructuring the UI to keep the editor outside of TabsContent so it persists when switching tabs. 

**Restructuring ui**

I'm reorganizing the UI layout to position the editor as a sibling to TabsList within the Tabs component. I'm adjusting the UI structure to show only the active tab's editor content using TabsContent. 

I'm using a single EditorContent component with dynamic content switching instead of multiple mounted elements. I'm implementing forceMount on TabsContent to prevent editor instance loss during tab switches. I'm using a single EditorContent component with dynamic value-driven section switching. I'm simplifying the editor structure by removing TabsContent and using Tabs directly for tab switching with a shared editor instance. I removed TabsContent since the editor instance is shared across tabs, making the content switching straightforward. </details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "Laudo Editor em Abas",
  "overview": "Substituir os botões customizados do LaudoEditor pelo componente Tabs do shadcn/ui, mantendo a lógica de edição por seção (Técnica, Descrição, Impressão) e corrigindo um bug de salvamento.",
  "plan": "# Laudo Editor com Abas\n\n## Contexto\nO [LaudoEditor](components/laudos/LaudoEditor.tsx) exibe três seções (Técnica, Descrição, Impressão) com botões customizados que alternam o conteúdo de um único editor TipTap. A proposta é usar o componente &#96;Tabs&#96; do shadcn/ui para uma UX consistente com o design system do projeto.\n\n## Estrutura atual\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TB\n    subgraph Header [Header]\n        Title[ título + paciente]\n        PrintBtn[Botão Imprimir]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph Tabs [Seleção de seção]\n        B1[Técnica]\n        B2[Descrição]\n        B3[Impressão]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph Editor [Área única]\n        TipTap[TipTap Editor - conteúdo muda conforme tab]\n    end\n    \n    subgraph Footer [Barra de ferramentas]\n        Format[Bold, Italic, List]\n        Save[Rascunho]\n        Finalize[Finalizar]\n    end\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Alterações propostas\n\n### 1. Trocar botões por componente Tabs\n\n**Arquivo:** [components/laudos/LaudoEditor.tsx](components/laudos/LaudoEditor.tsx)\n\n- Importar &#96;Tabs&#96;, &#96;TabsList&#96;, &#96;TabsTrigger&#96; de &#96;@/components/ui/tabs&#96;\n- Substituir o bloco de botões (linhas 226-244) por:\n  - &#96;Tabs&#96; com &#96;value={activeSection}&#96; e &#96;onValueChange&#96; para manter estado controlado\n  - &#96;TabsList&#96; com variant &#96;\"line\"&#96; para estilo discreto\n  - Três &#96;TabsTrigger&#96; para técnica, descrição, impressão\n\nA área do editor permanece única (um &#96;EditorContent&#96;); o conteúdo continua sendo alternado via &#96;activeSection&#96; quando a aba muda.\n\n### 2. Layout com Tabs\n\nEnvolver a área principal em &#96;Tabs&#96; e alinhar a navegação de abas ao layout existente:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\n\u003cTabs value={activeSection} onValueChange={(v) =\u003e setActiveSection(v as SectionKey)} className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 overflow-hidden\"\u003e\n  {/* Header existente */}\n  \u003cTabsList variant=\"line\" className=\"w-full justify-start rounded-none border-b ...\"\u003e\n    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"technique\"\u003eTécnica\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"description\"\u003eDescrição\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n    \u003cTabsTrigger value=\"impression\"\u003eImpressão\u003c/TabsTrigger\u003e\n  \u003c/TabsList\u003e\n  {/* Editor + footer - mantém estrutura atual */}\n\u003c/Tabs\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. Bug de salvamento (correção)\n\nAo clicar em \"Rascunho\" ou \"Finalizar\", os handlers usam &#96;snapshot&#96; para seções que não estão ativas, mas o valor correto está em &#96;contents&#96;:\n\n- Linhas 311-314 e 331-334: trocar &#96;snapshot.technique&#96;, &#96;snapshot.description&#96;, &#96;snapshot.impression&#96; por &#96;contents.technique&#96;, &#96;contents.description&#96;, &#96;contents.impression&#96; nas seções não ativas.\n\nExemplo:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx\ntechnique: activeSection === \"technique\" ? editor.getHTML() : contents.technique,\ndescription: activeSection === \"description\" ? editor.getHTML() : contents.description,\nimpression: activeSection === \"impression\" ? editor.getHTML() : contents.impression,\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Impacto\n- Nenhuma mudança em actions, tipos ou fluxo de dados\n- Comportamento de autosave e alternância de seção permanece igual\n- UI alinhada ao design system via shadcn Tabs\n"
}
```

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Implementação concluída. Resumo do que foi feito:

## Alterações implementadas

### 1. **Troca dos botões pelo componente Tabs**
- Import dos componentes `Tabs`, `TabsList` e `TabsTrigger` de `@/components/ui/tabs`
- Área principal envolvida em `<Tabs>` controlado por `value={activeSection}` e `onValueChange`
- Botões customizados substituídos por `<TabsList variant="line">` com três `<TabsTrigger>` para Técnica, Descrição e Impressão
- Remoção de `SECTION_LABELS` e do import de `cn`, que deixaram de ser usados

### 2. **Correção do bug de salvamento**
- Em ambos os handlers (Rascunho e Finalizar), substituído `snapshot.technique`, `snapshot.description` e `snapshot.impression` por `contents.technique`, `contents.description` e `contents.impression` para as seções não ativas
- O salvamento passa a usar o estado em memória (`contents`), garantindo que alterações em outras abas sejam persistidas corretamente

O editor continua usando um único TipTap, alternando o conteúdo conforme a aba. O visual das abas passa a seguir o design system do shadcn/ui com `variant="line"`.

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Syncing editor content**

I'm implementing content synchronization between parent state and individual editors using `editor.commands.setContent`. The initial render doesn't update when value changes, requiring useEffect for resets, but the normal flow works fine. 

**Managing editor refs**

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Investigating display issues**

I'm looking into why field content isn't rendering correctly in the LaudoSectionEditor. The TipTap editor doesn't update when parent content changes; it only uses initial content from `useEditor`. The TipTap editor fails to update when parent content changes, likely due to React Strict Mode mounting components twice and using stale content on second mount. TipTap's `useEditor` doesn't reinitialize on content changes, causing stale content display. The editor's internal state conflicts with new content prop, requiring a reset when content changes. The editor instance doesn't update when props change, causing a sync issue with content updates. 

**Checking variable rendering**

I'm investigating whether {{variable}} placeholders aren't rendering correctly in the HTML structure. The issue might be in how `contents` state is initialized in the parent component, since the editor receives `content: value` which could be empty or incorrect on first render. TipTap wraps content in default structures, so inline elements like `<span>` need to be wrapped in block elements like `<p>` for proper parsing by VariableExtension. 

I need to verify how TipTap's StarterKit handles bare inline elements and whether they require block wrapping for proper rendering. 

**Adding editor keys**

I'm adding unique `key` props to each LaudoSectionEditor to prevent React from reusing DOM nodes and mixing up content. I'm ensuring the initial state correctly processes HTML from props to avoid content mixing. 

**Processing HTML templates**

I'm handling HTML template processing by checking if snapshot.technique exists or if raw {{}} placeholders need processing. I'm checking if saved HTML contains data-variable attributes or raw {{}} placeholders to determine processing needs. 

**Syncing editor content**

I'm implementing useEffect to sync editor content when value prop changes, but need to avoid overwriting user input. I'm adding key={`technique-${itemId}`} to LaudoEditor to remount when itemId changes, avoiding sync issues with parent prop updates. 

**Checking variable extension**

I'm investigating whether the issue is with variable rendering in VariableExtension rather than editor remounting. The issue might be that TipTap expects a specific HTML format and empty content becomes '<p></p>' instead of proper structure. The editors share VariableContext values despite being independent, which may cause unexpected behavior. Each LaudoSectionEditor has its own VariableContext Provider, so VariableNodeView correctly receives the context from its parent editor's Provider. </details></think>

**Handling TipTap focus**

I'm addressing TypeScript inference issues with TipTap's focus handler by using an explicit type assertion on the editor config. I'm using a ref to track the editor instance and ensuring useEffect runs after initial render to avoid stale closures in handleDOMEvents. I'm addressing the timing issue where editorRef.current is null during initial editor creation by adjusting the useEffect dependency array. </details></think>

[Events in Tiptap | Tiptap Editor Docs](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/api/events)\n3. [Events | ueberdosis/tiptap](https://v1.tiptap.dev/docs/guide/events.html)\n4. [Editor Class | Tiptap Editor Docs](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/api/editor)\n\n# TipTap Editor Focus Event\n\nThe TipTap editor fires a &#96;focus&#96; event when the editor gains focus.[2] You can listen to this event in two ways:\n\n## Register the Event Listener\n\n**Option 1: During editor initialization**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nconst editor = new Editor({\n  onFocus({ editor, event }) {\n    // The editor is focused.\n  },\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Option 2: On a running editor instance**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\neditor.on('focus', ({ editor, event }) =\u003e {\n  // The editor is focused.\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nYou can also unbind the listener later using &#96;editor.off('focus', handler)&#96;.[2]\n\n## Focus Command\n\nAdditionally, you can programmatically set focus to the editor using the &#96;focus()&#96; command:[1]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\neditor.commands.focus()          // Restore cursor position\neditor.commands.focus('start')   // Move cursor to start\neditor.commands.focus('end')     // Move cursor to end\neditor.commands.focus('all')     // Select whole document\neditor.commands.focus(10)        // Move cursor to position 10\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe focus command accepts an optional &#96;scrollIntoView&#96; option (defaults to &#96;true&#96;) to control whether the cursor scrolls into view.[1]",

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Alterações feitas para corrigir a renderização dos campos:

## Alterações realizadas

### 1. **Página do editor** ([app/(protected)/laudos/[requestId]/[itemId]/page.tsx](app/(protected)/laudos/[requestId]/[itemId]/page.tsx))
- Adicionado `key={itemId}` no `LaudoEditor` para garantir remount ao trocar de laudo e recarregar o conteúdo inicial corretamente.

### 2. **LaudoEditor** – processamento do conteúdo
- Nova função `getInitialContent` que sempre processa o conteúdo com `processInitialHTML`, seja de `snapshot` ou de `template`, convertendo `{{variable}}` em `<span data-variable="...">` e preservando HTML já salvo.

### 3. **LaudoSectionEditor** – estrutura do conteúdo
- Função `ensureBlockWrapper` para garantir:
  - Conteúdo vazio vira `<p></p>`
  - Conteúdo apenas inline (ex.: spans) é envolvido em `<p>...</p>`
  - HTML com blocos (p, div, h1–h6, etc.) é mantido
- Uso de `handleDOMEvents` para evitar referência circular, e chamada de `onFocus` em um `useEffect` quando o editor recebe foco.

Com isso, o conteúdo de técnica, descrição e impressão deve ser exibido e editado corretamente, inclusive variáveis como `{{equipamento}}`.

Indicador de status do laudo incluído no header do editor.

## Alterações

1. **Configuração de status** – Uso do mesmo mapeamento da `LaudosTable`:
   - **Pendente** – badge secundário, ícone de relógio  
   - **Em andamento** – badge padrão, ícone de alerta  
   - **Concluído** – badge outline, ícone de check  

2. **Posicionamento** – Badge exibido ao lado do título do laudo no header, atualizado automaticamente ao finalizar.

O estado é passado para o componente e também é atualizado para `completed` quando o usuário clica em Finalizar.

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Resumo das mudanças feitas para que os campos se ajustem ao conteúdo:

## Alterações

### LaudoSectionEditor

1. **Altura mínima reduzida** – De `min-h-[180px]` para `min-h-[2.5rem]` (~1 linha) quando vazio.
2. **Sem altura fixa** – Os campos passam a crescer de acordo com o conteúdo.
3. **Layout** – Classes adicionadas: `border border-input rounded-md bg-background shadow-sm` para alinhar ao design system.
4. **Espaçamento** – Padding `px-3 py-2` para área de clique confortável.

### LaudoEditor

- **Remoção de `minHeight`** – Os três campos usam o padrão de uma linha e crescem conforme o conteúdo.

Resultado:
- Campos vazios ocupam só uma linha.
- Com mais texto ou listas, o tamanho aumenta automaticamente.
- O contêiner com `overflow-y-auto` mantém a rolagem quando o formulário fica maior que a tela.

---

_**User**_

vamos adicionar na coluna da direta on de ja tem as frases padrao, outra secao acima de variaveis do exame
e liste as variaveis, adicione dragdrop para incluir no corpo do laudo

---

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Implementei a seção de variáveis e o drag and drop. Resumo:

## Alterações realizadas

### 1. **Novo componente LaudoVariablesPanel** ([components/laudos/LaudoVariablesPanel.tsx](components/laudos/LaudoVariablesPanel.tsx))
- Seção "Variáveis do Exame" acima de "Frases Padrão"
- Lista todas as variáveis do modelo com label
- Ícone `GripVertical` em cada variável indicando que pode ser arrastada
- **Drag and drop**: arraste para o corpo do laudo para inserir
- **Clique**: clicar insere no editor focado (ou na Descrição se nenhum estiver focado)

### 2. **LaudoEditor**
- `LaudoVariablesPanel` inserido no topo da sidebar
- Área de conteúdo do formulário definida como drop zone (`onDragOver`, `onDrop`)
- `handleInsertVariable`: usa o comando `insertVariable` do TipTap para inserir o nó de variável
- `editorsRef`: guarda referências dos editores para definir onde inserir quando não há editor focado

### Fluxo de uso
1. **Arrastar**: arrastar uma variável da sidebar e soltar na área de edição
2. **Clicar**: clicar em uma variável insere no editor focado (ou na Descrição por padrão)
3. Após inserir, o chip da variável aparece no laudo e pode ser usada para escolher a opção (via popover existente)

---

_**User**_

adicione o componente rich text nos campos de editor de laudo, mas so mostra a barra de ferramentas flutuante quando algum texto for selecionado

---

      "chunk": "Links:\n1. [BubbleMenu extension | Tiptap Editor Docs](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/api/extensions/bubble-menu)\n2. [Show \u0026 Hide BubbleMenu programmatically · Issue #2305 · ueberdosis/tiptap](https://github.com/ueberdosis/tiptap/issues/2305)\n3. [Search code, repositories, users, issues, pull requests...](https://github.com/ueberdosis/tiptap/discussions/1303)\n4. [How can I get a Bubble Menu to only appear on click? · ueberdosis/tiptap · Discussion #5467 · GitHub](https://github.com/ueberdosis/tiptap/discussions/5467)\n5. [[Bug]: shouldShow broken in BubbleMenu extension from Vue 3 package · Issue #4870 · ueberdosis/tiptap](https://github.com/ueberdosis/tiptap/issues/4870)\n\n# TipTap BubbleMenu: Showing Only When Selection\n\nTo show the BubbleMenu only when there is a text selection, use the &#96;shouldShow&#96; option in the BubbleMenu configuration.[1]\n\n## Basic Approach\n\nThe &#96;shouldShow&#96; callback function receives editor state information and should return &#96;true&#96; or &#96;false&#96; to control visibility:[1]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nBubbleMenu.configure({\n  shouldShow: ({ editor, view, state, from, to }) =\u003e {\n    // Return true only when you want the menu to appear\n    return true;\n  }\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Checking for Specific Content\n\nTo show the menu only when specific marks or nodes are selected, use &#96;editor.isActive()&#96; within &#96;shouldShow&#96;:[3]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nshouldShow: ({ editor }) =\u003e editor.isActive(\"link\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nYou can also exclude certain node types:[3]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nshouldShow: ({ editor, view, state, from, to }) =\u003e {\n  return !editor.isActive(\"codeBlock\"); // Don't show in code blocks\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Vue 3 Note\n\nIn Vue 3 implementations, there's a known timing issue where &#96;editor.isActive()&#96; may return stale state. Use this workaround instead:[5]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nimport { isMarkActive } from '@tiptap/core';\n\nshouldShow: ({ editor }) =\u003e isMarkActive(editor.view.state, 'link')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Advanced: Click-Only Display\n\nFor showing the menu only on click (not on cursor movement), users have implemented custom solutions using the &#96;@floating-ui/react&#96; library with click event handlers.[4]",

{
  "markdown": "BubbleMenu extension | Tiptap Editor Docs\n\nThis extension will make a contextual menu appear near a selection of text. Use it to let users apply [marks](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/extensions/marks) to their text selection.\n\nAs always, the markup and styling is totally up to you.\n\nIf you are using a framework like React or Vue, use the frameworks specific&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; component instead of the extension. The component provides a more convenient API and handles the DOM element for you. You can find more information about the component in the Usage with frameworks section below.\n\n## Install\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nnpm install @tiptap/extension-bubble-menu\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Settings\n\n### element\n\nThe DOM element that contains your menu.\n\nType:&#96;HTMLElement&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;null&#96;\n\nIn the React version of the&#96;Bubble Menu&#96;, access the DOM element with the&#96;ref&#96; prop of the&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; component, by [passing a ref](https://react.dev/learn/manipulating-the-dom-with-refs) into it.\n\n### updateDelay\n\nThe&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; debounces the&#96;update&#96; method to allow the bubble menu to not be updated on every selection update. This can be controlled in milliseconds. The&#96;BubbleMenuPlugin&#96; will come with a default delay of 250ms. This can be deactivated, by setting the delay to&#96;0&#96; which deactivates the debounce.\n\nType:&#96;Number&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;undefined&#96;\n\n### resizeDelay\n\nThe&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; debounces the resize calculation for the bubble menu to allow the bubble menu to not be updated on every resize event. This can be controlled in milliseconds.\n\nType:&#96;Number&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;100&#96;\n\n### options\n\nUnder the hood, the&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; [Floating UI](https://floating-ui.com/). You can control the middleware and positioning of the floating menu with these options.\n\nType:&#96;Object&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;{ strategy: 'absolute', placement: 'right' }&#96;\n\n| Option | Type | Description |\n| --- | --- | --- |\n| &#96;strategy&#96; | &#96;string&#96; | The positioning strategy. See [here](https://floating-ui.com/docs/computePosition#strategy) |\n| &#96;placement&#96; | &#96;string&#96; | The placement of the menu. See [here](https://floating-ui.com/docs/computePosition#placement) |\n| &#96;offset&#96; | &#96;number&#96;,&#96;OffsetOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [offset middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/offset#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;flip&#96; | &#96;FlipOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [flip middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/flip#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;shift&#96; | &#96;ShiftOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [shift middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/shift#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;arrow&#96; | &#96;ArrowOptions&#96; or&#96;false&#96; | The [arrow middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/arrow#options). If&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;size&#96; | &#96;SizeOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [size middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/size#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;autoPlacement&#96; | &#96;AutoPlacementOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [autoPlacement middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/autoPlacement#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;hide&#96; | &#96;HideOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [hide middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/hide#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;inline&#96; | &#96;InlineOptions&#96; or&#96;boolean&#96; | The [inline middleware options](https://floating-ui.com/docs/inline#options). If&#96;true&#96; use default options, if&#96;false&#96; disable the middleware |\n| &#96;onShow&#96; | &#96;Function&#96; or&#96;undefined&#96; | A callback that is called when the menu is shown. This can be used to add custom logic or styles when the menu is displayed. |\n| &#96;onHide&#96; | &#96;Function&#96; or&#96;undefined&#96; | A callback that is called when the menu is hidden. This can be used to add custom logic or styles when the menu is hidden. |\n| &#96;onUpdate&#96; | &#96;Function&#96; or&#96;undefined&#96; | A callback that is called when the menu is updated. This can be used to add custom logic or styles when the menu is updated. |\n| &#96;onDestroy&#96; | &#96;Function&#96; or&#96;undefined&#96; | A callback that is called when the menu is destroyed. This can be used to add custom logic or styles when the menu is removed. |\n\n### pluginKey\n\nThe key for the underlying ProseMirror plugin. Make sure to use different keys if you add more than one instance.\n\nType:&#96;string | PluginKey&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;'bubbleMenu'&#96;\n\n### shouldShow\n\nA callback to control whether the menu should be shown or not.\n\nType:&#96;(props) =\u003e boolean&#96;\n\n### appendTo\n\nThe element to which the bubble menu should be appended to in the DOM. Can be a&#96;HTMLElement&#96; or a callback function that returns a&#96;HTMLElement&#96;.\n\nType:&#96;HTMLElement | (() =\u003e HTMLElement) | undefined&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;undefined&#96;, the menu will be appended to the editor's parent element (&#96;editor.view.dom.parentElement&#96;).\n\n### getReferencedVirtualElement\n\nA callback to provide the anchor coordinates used to position the menu. Should return a [virtual element](https://floating-ui.com/docs/virtual-elements) as expected by [Floating UI](https://floating-ui.com/).\n\nType:&#96;() =\u003e VirtualElement | null&#96;\n\nDefault:&#96;null&#96;, anchor is implied by the editor selection.\n\n## Source code\n\n[packages/extension-bubble-menu/](https://github.com/ueberdosis/tiptap/blob/main/packages/extension-bubble-menu/)\n\n## Use the extension\n\n### JavaScript\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nimport { Editor } from '@tiptap/core'\nimport BubbleMenu from '@tiptap/extension-bubble-menu'\n\nnew Editor({\n  extensions: [\n    BubbleMenu.configure({\n      element: document.querySelector('.menu'),\n    }),\n  ],\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Usage with frameworks\n\n### React\n\nThe&#96;@tiptap/react&#96; package comes with a&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; component you can import from&#96;@tiptap/react/menus&#96;. It provides the same functionality as the extension but with a React-friendly API. When using this component, you don't need to add the&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; extension to your editor.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nimport { BubbleMenu } from '@tiptap/react/menus'\n\nfunction MyBubbleMenu({ editor }) {\n  return (\n    \u003cBubbleMenu editor={editor}\u003e\n      \u003cbutton onClick={() =\u003e editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run()}\u003e\n        Bold\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n      \u003cbutton onClick={() =\u003e editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run()}\u003e\n        Italic\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n    \u003c/BubbleMenu\u003e\n  )\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Vue\n\nThe&#96;@tiptap/vue-3&#96; package comes with a&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; component you can import from&#96;@tiptap/vue-3/menus&#96;. It provides the same functionality as the extension but with a Vue-friendly API. When using this component, you don't need to add the&#96;BubbleMenu&#96; extension to your editor.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cBubbleMenu :editor=\"editor\"\u003e\n    \u003cbutton @click=\"editor.chain().focus().toggleBold().run()\"\u003e\n      Bold\n    \u003c/button\u003e\n    \u003cbutton @click=\"editor.chain().focus().toggleItalic().run()\"\u003e\n      Italic\n    \u003c/button\u003e\n  \u003c/BubbleMenu\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n\u003cscript setup\u003e\n  import { BubbleMenu } from '@tiptap/vue-3/menus'\n  \n  // make sure to pass the editor instance as a prop to the BubbleMenu component\n  const { editor } = defineProps({\n    editor: {\n      type: Object,\n      required: true,\n    },\n  })\n\u003c/script\u003e\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nNote: The same menu is also available in the Vue 2 version of Tiptap, you can import it from&#96;@tiptap/vue-2/menus&#96;.\n\n### Custom logic\n\nCustomize the logic for showing the menu with the&#96;shouldShow&#96; option. For components,&#96;shouldShow&#96; can be passed as a prop.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nBubbleMenu.configure({\n  shouldShow: ({ editor, view, state, oldState, from, to }) =\u003e {\n    // only show the bubble menu for images and links\n    return editor.isActive('image') || editor.isActive('link')\n  },\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Multiple menus\n\nUse multiple menus by setting an unique&#96;pluginKey&#96;.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nimport { Editor } from '@tiptap/core'\nimport BubbleMenu from '@tiptap/extension-bubble-menu'\n\nnew Editor({\n  extensions: [\n    BubbleMenu.configure({\n      pluginKey: 'bubbleMenuOne',\n      element: document.querySelector('.menu-one'),\n    }),\n    BubbleMenu.configure({\n      pluginKey: 'bubbleMenuTwo',\n      element: document.querySelector('.menu-two'),\n    }),\n  ],\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nAlternatively you can pass a ProseMirror&#96;PluginKey&#96;.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nimport { Editor } from '@tiptap/core'\nimport BubbleMenu from '@tiptap/extension-bubble-menu'\nimport { PluginKey } from '@tiptap/pm/state'\n\nnew Editor({\n  extensions: [\n    BubbleMenu.configure({\n      pluginKey: new PluginKey('bubbleMenuOne'),\n      element: document.querySelector('.menu-one'),\n    }),\n    BubbleMenu.configure({\n      pluginKey: new PluginKey('bubbleMenuTwo'),\n      element: document.querySelector('.menu-two'),\n    }),\n  ],\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Force update the position of the bubble menu\n\nIf the bubble menu changes size after the initial render, its position will not be adjusted automatically. To fix this, you can force update the position of the bubble menu by emitting an&#96;'updatePosition'&#96; event.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\neditor.commands.setMeta('bubbleMenu', 'updatePosition')\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n[PreviouslyAI Toolkit](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/extensions/functionality/ai-toolkit)\n\n[Next upCharacter count](https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/extensions/functionality/character-count)",
  "url": "https://tiptap.dev/docs/editor/api/extensions/bubble-menu"
}

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Checking BubbleMenu context**

The BubbleMenu should work correctly since we're explicitly passing the editor prop. The BubbleMenu fails when not inside EditorProvider since useCurrentEditor returns null without proper context. 

The BubbleMenu works correctly when editor is passed as prop, since useCurrentEditor only falls back when editor is null. The BubbleMenu renders its children into a portal attached to the editor's DOM tree for proper plugin positioning. </details></think>

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Implementei o editor rich text com barra flutuante. Resumo das alterações:

## Alterações realizadas

### 1. Novo componente `LaudoRichTextEditor` ([components/laudos/LaudoRichTextEditor.tsx](components/laudos/LaudoRichTextEditor.tsx))
- **Extensions**: StarterKit, TextAlign, AlignedImageResize (imagens redimensionáveis), VariableExtension
- **Barra flutuante** com `BubbleMenu` do TipTap, exibida apenas quando há seleção (`shouldShow={({ state }) => !state.selection.empty}`)
- **Botões na barra**: Negrito, Itálico, Lista, Inserir Imagem, Alinhamento (esquerda/centro/direita/justificar), Desfazer, Refazer
- **Imagens**: upload para o storage `signatures` (mesmo padrão do `RichTextEditor`)
- **Variáveis**: mantém `VariableContext` e integração com variáveis do exame
- **Callbacks**: `onEditorReady`, `onFocus` para o `LaudoEditor` controlar o editor ativo

### 2. Atualização do `LaudoEditor`
- Troca de `LaudoSectionEditor` por `LaudoRichTextEditor`
- Remoção da barra fixa inferior (Bold, Italic, List, Undo, Redo) — formatação passa a ser feita só pela barra flutuante ao selecionar texto
- Manutenção apenas dos botões Rascunho e Finalizar no rodapé

### Comportamento
- Ao selecionar texto em qualquer campo (Técnica, Descrição, Impressão), a barra de ferramentas aparece acima da seleção
- Ao desselecionar (clicar fora ou mover o cursor), a barra some
